hero.title: Strategic Legal Defense in Oaxaca
hero.subtitle: Specialists in property, civil, family, and administrative law. We protect your assets with strategy and results.

authority.title: Legal Authority in
authority.description1: We deeply understand the legal and administrative environment of the State of Oaxaca. Our firm distinguishes itself for meticulous analysis and impeccable execution in every case we handle before local and federal courts.
authority.description2: Whether you face a disproportionate property tax charge from the municipality of Oaxaca de Juárez, Santa Lucía del Camino or Xoxocotlán, or need to secure your family assets through an inheritance proceeding, we provide absolute legal certainty.
authority.feature1_desc: In-depth analysis of each case file.
authority.feature2_desc: Total transparency in fees and processes.

expertise.title: Areas of
expertise.subtitle: Specialty
expertise.description: Our practice focuses on critical areas of law in Oaxaca, where precision and strategy determine case success.

predial.title: Property Tax Reduction
predial.description: Defense against excessive property tax charges in Oaxaca de Juárez and surrounding municipalities through nullity lawsuits.

civil.title: Civil Law
civil.description: Property regularization (Usucapion), inheritance proceedings (intestate and testamentary) and high-rigor contract drafting.

familiar.title: Family Law
familiar.description: Strategic resolution of no-fault divorces, child support, and custody before the Family Courts of Centro Oaxaca.

administrativo.title: Administrative Law
administrativo.description: Defense against business closures, traffic fines, and arbitrary acts by municipal and state authorities.

testimonial1.quote: The Oaxaca municipality wanted to charge me an absurd amount of property tax for a supposed update. Attorney Karina filed a nullity lawsuit and we managed to reduce the payment by 60%. Excellent lawyer, very professional.
testimonial1.author: Roberto M.

testimonial2.quote: We had been trying for years to fix the deeds to my grandparents' house. Thanks to their advice on the intestate succession proceeding, we finally have legal certainty about our family assets in Jalatlaco.
testimonial2.author: García Family

testimonial3.quote: My divorce process was quick and uncomplicated thanks to their intervention. They achieved a fair agreement for child support for my children. I highly recommend their law firm.
testimonial3.author: Ana Lilia S.

hero.title: Success
hero.subtitle: Our best reference are the results. Learn how we have protected the assets, freedom and rights of our clients in Oaxaca.

case1.title: Nullification of Administrative Fine and Municipal Closure
case1.summary: We achieved full nullification of a fine imposed arbitrarily by the municipality on a local construction company.

case2.title: Regularization of High-Value Coastal Property
case2.summary: We advised a group of investors on the safe transition from communal possession rights to private property.

case3.title: Defense of Landowners in Wind Farm Lease Contracts
case3.summary: We advised land owners in reviewing and renegotiating lease contracts with wind energy companies.

case4.title: Nullification of Excessive Property Tax Charges
case4.summary: We successfully challenged an arbitrary cadastral update that multiplied the property tax of several commercial properties.

contact.title: Schedule
contact.description: We handle each case with maximum confidentiality and legal rigor. Contact us to evaluate your legal situation in Oaxaca de Juárez and surrounding municipalities.
contact.location_note: Exclusive attention by appointment to guarantee the privacy of your case.
